name: User Declines Cancellation at Confirmation Gate

transcript.bot: I'm sorry to hear you'd like to cancel your subscription. Could you share the reason for your cancellation? Your feedback helps us improve your experience.

result.cancellationOptionMessage: Your subscription will be cancelled after a 30-day notice period.

transcript.bot:
I understand your request. Instead of cancelling, we recommend trying our Pause feature. This lets you pause your subscription at no cost and reactivate it whenever you choose. It's a great way to keep your account active without losing your current benefits.

Would you like to explore this option?

If I cancel your subscription today, your 30-day notice period will begin. During this time, you can still enjoy full access to DAZN content without any interruptions.

If applicable, you will make a final prorated payment on your scheduled billing date, [nextChargeDate]. This payment will be lower than your usual monthly charge, as it covers the remaining days of the notice period.

Would you like me to go ahead and cancel now?
No problem at all! Your subscription will remain active. If you need any help in the future, just let me know. Have a great day!

results.criterion: Bot presents cancellation impact message and asks confirmation
results.reason: The bot explains the 30-day notice period, continued access, and prorated payment, then asks if the user wants to proceed with cancellation.

results.criterion: After user says 'never mind', bot does NOT call cancelProduct or cancelProductImmediate
results.reason: No cancelProduct or cancelProductImmediate tool calls are made after the user says 'never mind'.
The bot confirms the subscription remains active and ends the conversation politely.

evaluation.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot handled the cancellation request and retraction correctly and politely.
criteria: Bot presents cancellation impact message and asks confirmation
After user says 'never mind', bot does NOT call cancelProduct or cancelProductImmediate
